ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seismic_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic network */,
  "network_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the seismic network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic network */,
  "operated_by" TEXT /* Institution or organization operating the seismic network */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the deployment period */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the network */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the seismic network */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the network data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_networks_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES deployments ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_networks_operated_by FOREIGN KEY ("operated_by") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the deployment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the deployment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., planned, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seismic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic data entry */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic network the data belongs to */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the seismic data file */,
  "data_file_size" REAL /* Size of the seismic data file in MB */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of seismic data (e.g., earthquake, ambient noise) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the seismic data file (e.g., SEED, SAC) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data file was uploaded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seismic data collection point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seismic data collection point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the seismic data collection point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the seismic data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "processing_level" TEXT /* Level of processing applied to the data (e.g., raw, filtered, analyzed) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seismic_data_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES seismic_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the seismic data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the seismic data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation with an institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic data used in the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors in JSON format */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES seismic_data ("data_id")
)
